channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: FBI Director Kash Patel outlines record-breaking World Cup security operation
item.description: In an exclusive interview, FBI Director Kash Patel details the massive security effort for the World Cup, including 700 drone takedowns and no major incidents.

item.title: Watch: President Trump presents World Cup trophy to Spain
Troy Jackson secures delegate support as top Democratic Senate rivals withdraw
item.description: Troy Jackson secured delegates after opponents Shenna Bellows and Nirav Shah exited the race to replace Graham Platner against Susan Collins.

item.title: RNC offers election assistance to Maine Democrats in letter
item.description: The RNC sent a sarcastic letter offering election lawyers and observers to Democrats as Maine works to replace Graham Platner.
